### Problem

<!-- What can't you do today, or what is awkward? Concrete examples
beat abstract framing. -->

### Proposal

<!-- The minimal API or behavior change you'd like. Code sketches welcome. -->

### Alternatives considered

<!-- Other shapes you thought about and why this one wins. -->

### Scope

- [ ] Pure addition (no break to existing callers)
- [ ] Soft deprecation (old path still works)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires a major version bump)
